config.title: CREATOR_TITLE #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'MessageBox #include "50122"
'cDrawReport,cButton #include "50526"
'prop_util, prop_util_item #include "50134"
'fire_choice_list #include "50200"
'GetMenu #include "50506"
'MessageBox #include "50122"
dim oPU : set oPU = nothing dim oPUCopy : set oPUCopy = nothing
'maksymalne wcięcie dim g_nMaxInd
'----------------------------------------------- 'standardowa funkcja wolana przy otwarciu strony '----------------------------------------------- function fopen : fopen = false 'utworzenie nowego prop_util frefresh() fopen = true end function
'----------------- 'rysuj cały raport '----------------- sub drawRaport(byref g_oDrawRep) if oPU.count() >= 0 then drawPageButtons drawResultTable g_oDrawRep drawActionTable else drawBrakDanych end if end sub
'-------------------------------- 'przyciski do przełączania strony '-------------------------------- sub drawPageButtons dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ROW_BUTTONS)) pTB.section_body.removeall pTB.newrow.newcell
'button prev dim pNewHli : set pNewHli = doc_.createhli() pNewHli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "prevPage" pNewHli.prop(PROP_ROW_IDENT) = pTB.row.ident pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON, -1 with pTB.element .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_PREV_BUTTON) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") set .hli = pNewHli .text = "<<" .size = 9 .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
'button next set pNewHli = doc_.createhli() pNewHli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "nextPage" pNewHli.prop(PROP_ROW_IDENT) = pTB.row.ident pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON, -1 with pTB.element .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_NEXT_BUTTON) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") set .hli = pNewHli .text = ">>" .size = 9 .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT end sub
'----------------- 'tabela z wynikami '----------------- sub drawResultTable(byref g_oDrawRep) dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall drawHeader pTB, g_oDrawRep drawBody pTB, g_oDrawRep 'drawFooter pTB end sub
'------------ 'tabela akcji '------------ sub drawActionTable dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ACTION_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall pTB.newrow.newcell dim giveButton : set giveButton = new cButton giveButton.newButton pTB, CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON, "wydanie", "RP", 13, ALIGN_LEFT, false giveButton.newButton pTB, CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON, "edit_prop", "Edycja", 13, ALIGN_LEFT, false pTB.newcell giveButton.newButton pTB, CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON, "gotowa", "Ilość gotowa", 13, ALIGN_RIGHT, false giveButton.newButton pTB, CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON, "wykonana", "Ilość wykonana", 13, ALIGN_RIGHT, false end sub
'---------------------------------- 'komunikat w przypadku braku danych '---------------------------------- sub drawBrakDanych dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.fontsize=4 pTB.newcell.addtext "Brak danych spełniających podane kryteria" end sub
'--------------- 'nagłowek tabeli '--------------- sub drawHeader(byref pTB, byref g_oDrawRep) pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.fontsize = 4 g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 1, "", 500, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, 1, "LP", 500, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_NR_ZLECENIA, "Nr zlecenia", 2500, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_ILOSC_ZLEC, "Ilość zlec", 800, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_SCIEZKA_KODU, "Ścieżka kodu op", 1800, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_DATA_ROZP, "Data rozp", 1800, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_DATA_ZAK, "Data zakończenia", 1800, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_TYP_ZASOBU, "Typ zasobu", 1800, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_NAZWA_ZASOBU, "Zasób", 1800, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_NAZWA_PROD, "Produkt", 1800, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_TYP_PROD, "Typ", 700, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_NAZWA_RECEPT, "Recepta", 2000, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_STATUS_OPER, "Status", 1200, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_ILOSC_DO_WYK, "Ilość do wyk", 1000, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_ILOSC_GOTOWA, "Ilość gotowa", 1000, "", 1, 1, false g_oDrawRep.drawCellHead pTB, KOL_ILOSC_WYKON, "Ilość wykon", 1000, "", 1, 1, false end sub
'----------------- 'pojedynczy wiersz '----------------- sub drawRow(byref pTB, byref oPUI, byref g_oDrawRep, byval nLP) 'id operacji produkcyjnej dim idProp : idProp = oPUI.m_idProp
pTB.newrow set pTB.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() pTB.row.userprop.prop(PROP_BUF_INX) = nLP - 1 'właściwości całego wiersza pTB.row.fontsize = 3 pTB.row.backcolor = setRowStyle(nLP) dim crColor : crColor = setRowStyle(nLP)
'wybrane obiekty dim oZlecProd : set oZlecProd = nothing dim oPozZlecProd : set oPozZlecProd = nothing dim oTypZasobu : set oTypZasobu = nothing dim oZasob : set oZasob = nothing dim oProdukt : set oProdukt = nothing dim oRecepta : set oRecepta = nothing if oPUI.m_idZlecProd > clng(0) then set oZlecProd = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,oPUI.m_idZlecProd) set oPozZlecProd = oZlecProd.listPozycje.get(oPUI.m_iLPZP) end if if oPUI.m_idTypZasobu > clng(0) then set oTypZasobu = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5TYPZASOBPROD,oPUI.m_idTypZasobu) end if if oPUI.m_idZasob > clng(0) then set oZasob = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZASOBPROD,oPUI.m_idZasob) end if if oPUI.m_idProdukt > clng(0) then set oProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oPUI.m_idProdukt) end if if oPUI.m_idOperacja > clng(0) then set oRecepta = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5RECEPTA,oPUI.m_idOperacja) end if
'checkbox dim pCheckBox pTB.newcell pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1 set pCheckBox = pTB.element with pCheckBox .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_ROW_CHECKBOX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") .border = 0 .width = setWidthInd(oPUI.m_strOP) end with pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.element.addnew CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1
g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, cstr(nLP), "Verdana", ALIGN_RIGHT, 0, 0, "" if not oZlecProd is nothing then g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD, oZlecProd.idobj, oZlecProd.strNrDok g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, 0, oPozZlecProd.curIloscOpak, "Verdana", 4, 8, "", crColor else g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, 0, ccur(0), "Verdana", 4, 10, "", crColor end if g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, oPUI.m_strOP, "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" g_oDrawRep.drawCellDate pTB, 0, oPUI.m_dDataRozp, "Verdana", crColor g_oDrawRep.drawCellDate pTB, 0, oPUI.m_dDataZak, "Verdana", crColor if not oTypZasobu is nothing then g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, oTypZasobu.tzp_strNazwa, "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" else g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" end if if not oZasob is nothing then g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, oZasob.zsp_strNazwa, "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" else g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" end if if not oProdukt is nothing then g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, oProdukt.strNazwa, "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" g_oDrawRep.drawCell PTB, strTyp(oProdukt.prod_cWyrob,oProdukt.prod_cSurowiec), "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" else g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" end if if not oRecepta is nothing then g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, oRecepta.strNazwa, "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" else g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" end if g_oDrawRep.drawCell pTB, strStatus(oPUI.m_eStatus), "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, 0, oPUI.m_curIloscDoWyk, "Verdana", 4, 10, "", crColor g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, 0, oPUI.m_curIloscGotow, "Verdana", 4, 10, "", crColor g_oDrawRep.drawCellCur pTB, 0, oPUI.m_curIloscWykon, "Verdana", 4, 10, "", crColor end sub
'----------------------------------- 'zwraca status operacji produkcyjnej '----------------------------------- function strStatus(byval eStatus) select case eStatus case 1 strStatus = "Sym" case 2 strStatus = "Zlec" case 3 strStatus = "Do wyk" case 4 strStatus = "W real" case 5 strStatus = "Zreal" case else strStatus = "Inny" end select end function
'---------------------------------------------------------- 'zwraca typ produktu W-wyrób, S-surowiec, WS-wyrób/surowiec '---------------------------------------------------------- function strTyp(byval cWyrob, byval cSurowiec) : strTyp = "" if cWyrob = "1" and cSurowiec = "1" then strTyp = "WS" else if cWyrob = "1" then strTyp = "W" elseif cSurowiec = "1" then strTyp = "S" else strTyp = "" end if end if end function
'--------------- 'kolejne wiersze '--------------- sub drawBody(byref pTB, byref g_oDrawRep) 'pierwszy wiersz przedziału dim nFirstRow : nFirstRow = (g_oDrawRep.m_nRange - 1) * MAX_ROW_NR + 1 dim iter, oPUI dim iLicz : iLicz = cint(1) for iter = (nFirstRow - 1) to oPU.count() set oPUI = oPU.get_item(iter) drawRow pTB, oPUI, g_oDrawRep, iter + 1 if iLicz = MAX_ROW_NR then exit for end if iLicz = iLicz + 1 next end sub
'------------------- 'podsumowanie tabeli '------------------- sub drawFooter(byref pTB) 'TODO: end sub
'----------------- 'poprzednia strona '----------------- function prevPage(pHLI) g_oDrawRep.m_nRange = g_oDrawRep.m_nRange - 1 if g_oDrawRep.m_nRange = 1 then dim oRow : set oRow = page_.ctrl(pHLI.prop(PROP_ROW_IDENT)) oRow.cell(1).element(1).disable = true end if drawResultTable g_oDrawRep end function
'--------------- 'następna strona '--------------- function nextPage(pHLI) g_oDrawRep.m_nRange = g_oDrawRep.m_nRange + 1 if g_oDrawRep.m_nRange = g_oDrawRep.m_nNumRange then dim oRow : set oRow = page_.ctrl(pHLI.prop(PROP_ROW_IDENT)) oRow.cell(1).element(2).disable = true end if drawResultTable g_oDrawRep end function
'-------------------------------------------- 'ustawia kolor dla wiersza w zależności od LP '-------------------------------------------- function setRowStyle(iLP) if iLP mod 2 = 0 then setRowStyle = ROW_COLOR else setRowStyle = WHITE_COLOR end if end function
'------------------- 'kolorowanie wiersza '------------------- function changeRowColor(byref oRow, byval newValue) if newValue = "1" then 'wiersz na żółto oRow.backcolor = YELLOW_COLOR else 'usuń żółty kolor if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_BUF_INX) then dim iLP : iLP = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_BUF_INX) + 1 oRow.backcolor = setRowStyle(iLP) end if end if changeRowColor = oRow.backcolor end function
'----------------------------------- 'zwraca true jeśli modyfikowano PROP '----------------------------------- function compare_PUI(byval nIndex) : compare_PUI = false dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPU.get_item(nIndex) dim oPUIBuf : set oPUIBuf = oPUCopy.get_item(nIndex) if (not oPU.compare_item(oPUI,oPUIBuf)) or (oPUIBuf.m_curIloscWykon > ccur(0)) then compare_PUI = true else compare_PUI = false end if end function
'------------ 'edycja propa '------------ function edit_prop() if g_oRepDict.getDictionary().count <> clng(0) then dim pMsgPage : set pMsgPage = doc_.getmodule(60325) dim nMsgPageRes : nMsgPageRes = pMsgPage.drawPageEdit(oPU,oPUCopy,g_oRepDict,new cDrawReport) if nMsgPageRes = 1 then zapisz() else 'przywróć dane początkowe dim iter set oPUCopy = new_prop_util() for iter = 0 to oPU.count() dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPU.get_item(iter) dim oPUIClone : set oPUIClone = oPUCopy.clone_item(oPUI) 'wyzerowanie ilości wykonanej oPUIClone.m_curIloscWykon = ccur(0) oPUCopy.add_item oPUIClone, false next end if else trans_.message 7000, 0, "Nie wybrano operacji." exit function end if end function
'------------------- 'potwierdzenie zmian '------------------- function zapisz() dim oPUIBuf, iter 'sprawdź czy wprowadzano zmiany dim bModify : bModify = false for iter = 0 to oPUCopy.count() if compare_PUI(iter) then bModify = true exit for end if next if bModify then for iter = 0 to oPUCopy.count() set oPUIBuf = oPUCopy.get_item(iter) if compare_PUI(iter) then oPU.apply_item oPUIBuf end if next oPU.save() fRefresh() else trans_.message 7000, 0, "Nie wprowadzano zmian." exit function end if end function
'----------------- 'wydanie materiału '----------------- function wydanie() if g_oRepDict.getDictionary().count <> clng(0) then if isRawMaterial() then dim pMsgPage : set pMsgPage = doc_.getmodule(60325) dim nMsgPageRes : nMsgPageRes = pMsgPage.drawPageRawMat(oPUCopy,g_oRepDict,new cDrawReport) if nMsgPageRes = 1 then 'utwórz RP createRP oPUCopy else 'przywróć dane początkowe dim iter set oPUCopy = new_prop_util() for iter = 0 to oPU.count() dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPU.get_item(iter) dim oPUIClone : set oPUIClone = oPUCopy.clone_item(oPUI) 'wyzerowanie ilości wykonanej oPUIClone.m_curIloscWykon = ccur(0) oPUCopy.add_item oPUIClone, false next end if else trans_.message 7000, 0, "Nie wybrano surowca." exit function end if else trans_.message 7000, 0, "Nie wybrano operacji." exit function end if end function
'-------------------------------- 'zwraca true gdy wybrano surowiec '-------------------------------- function isRawMaterial() : isRawMaterial = false dim iter, oPUI for iter = 0 to oPUCopy.count() set oPUI = oPUCopy.get_item(iter) if g_oRepDict.exists(iter) and oPUI.m_eTyp = N5PROPT_SUROWIEC then isRawMaterial = true exit function end if next end function
'---------------------------------- 'sprawdza ilość gotową do produkcji '---------------------------------- function gotowa() dim pM60327 : set pM60327 = doc_.getmodule(60327) dim oPQ : set oPQ = pM60327.new_prop_query()
'załadowanie PROP'ow o danym where i order by oPQ.load_prop "","idobj desc"
'operacje możliwe do wykonania oPQ.set_ready_prop()
fRefresh() end function
'----------------------- 'sprawdza ilość wykonaną '----------------------- function wykonana() dim pM60327 : set pM60327 = doc_.getmodule(60327) dim oPQ : set oPQ = pM60327.new_prop_query()
'załadowanie PROP'ow o danym where i order by oPQ.load_prop "","idobj desc"
'wykonane oPQ.set_made_prop()
fRefresh()
dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPU.get_item(oPU.count()) if oPUI.m_curIloscDoWyk = oPUI.m_curIloscWykon then MessageBox "Zlecenie jest zrealizowane w całości" , "Zlecenie produkcyjne", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if end function
'--------- 'tworzy RP '--------- function createRP(byref oPUCopy) dim iter, pPoz trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = clng(N5REJESTRDOK__RP) dim pOpenFormRP : set pOpenFormRP = doc_.getmodule(60129).prepare_form_open_command(TYPEID_N5DOKMAG,0,0) if pOpenFormRP is nothing then exit function end if dim pFormRP : set pFormRP = doc_.getpagehli(pOpenFormRP) if pFormRP is nothing then exit function end if
dim oPUI for iter = 0 to oPUCopy.count() set oPUI = oPUCopy.get_item(iter) if oPUI.m_eTyp = N5PROPT_SUROWIEC and oPUI.m_idProdukt > clng(0) and oPUI.m_idOpak > clng(0) and oPUI.m_curIloscWykon > ccur(0) then set pPoz = pFormRP.root.listPozycje.addnew() set pPoz.pProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oPUI.m_idProdukt) set pPoz.pOpak = pPoz.pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(pPoz.pProdukt.listOpakowania.findonid(oPUI.m_idOpak)) pPoz.curIloscOpak = ccur(oPUI.m_curIloscWykon) end if next set pFormRP.root.wrefDokHandl = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD,oPUCopy.get_item(0).m_idZlecProd) pFormRP.domodalauto()
if pFormRP.root.strNrDok <> "" then zapisz() end if
end function
'-------------- 'odśwież raport '-------------- function fRefresh() 'obiekt prop_util set oPU = new_prop_util() dim strWhere : strWhere = "" dim strOrderBy : strOrderBy = "idobj"
'załadowanie PROP'ow z bazy oPU.load_set strWhere, strOrderBy
'kopia PROP'ow dim iter set oPUCopy = new_prop_util() for iter = 0 to oPU.count() dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPU.get_item(iter) dim oPUIClone : set oPUIClone = oPUCopy.clone_item(oPUI) 'wyzerowanie ilości wykonanej oPUIClone.m_curIloscWykon = ccur(0) oPUCopy.add_item oPUIClone, false next
'słownik set g_oRepDict = new cRepDict
'wyświetlenie PROP'ow g_nMaxInd = maxInd set g_oDrawRep = new cDrawReport g_oDrawRep.m_nNumRange = recRangeNr() drawRaport g_oDrawRep end function
'------------------------------ 'zlicza max wcięcie dla wierszy '------------------------------ function maxInd : maxInd = clng(0) dim iter,strPath for iter = 0 to oPUCopy.count() strPath = oPUCopy.get_item(iter).m_strOP findMaxInd maxInd, strPath next end function
'------------------------------------ 'zlicza ilosc wystąpień '/' w stringu '------------------------------------ sub findMaxInd(byref maxInd, byval strPath) dim iter dim nLicz : nLicz = 0 for iter = 1 to Len(strPath) if Mid(strPath,iter,1) = "/" then nLicz = nLicz + 1 end if next if nLicz > maxInd then maxInd = nLicz end if end sub
'-------------------------------- 'ustawia szerokość wcięcia dla LP '-------------------------------- function setWidthInd(byval strPath) : setWidthInd = "" dim iNr : iNr = 0 findMaxInd iNr, strPath setWidthInd = CHECKBOX_WIDTH + (-(iNr - g_nMaxInd)*400) end function
'------------------------ 'zlicza ilość przedziałów '------------------------ function recRangeNr() dim dblNr : dblNr = (oPU.count()+1)/MAX_ROW_NR if dblNr - Int(dblNr) > 0 then recRangeNr = Int(dblNr) + 1 else recRangeNr = Int(dblNr) end if end function
'------------------------ 'kontrolki dla przycisków '------------------------ function c##CTRLID_PREV_BUTTON##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_PREV_BUTTON##_ongetdata = true if oPU.count() >= 0 then if g_oDrawRep.m_nRange = 1 then oCtrl.disable = true else oCtrl.disable = false end if else oCtrl.disable = true end if end function
function c##CTRLID_NEXT_BUTTON##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_NEXT_BUTTON##_ongetdata = true if oPU.count() >= 0 then if g_oDrawRep.m_nRange = g_oDrawRep.m_nNumRange then oCtrl.disable = true else oCtrl.disable = false end if else oCtrl.disable = true end if end function
function c##CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_REALIZE_BUTTON##_ongetdata = true if oPU.count() >= 0 then oCtrl.disable = false else oCtrl.disable = true end if end function
'------------------------- 'kontrolki dla checkbox'ów '------------------------- function c##CTRLID_ROW_CHECKBOX##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_ROW_CHECKBOX##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_ROW_CHECKBOX##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) : c##CTRLID_ROW_CHECKBOX##_ondataentered = false dim nIndex, oPUI dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_BUF_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_BUF_INX) if newValue = "1" then g_oRepDict.add nIndex, oPUCopy.get_item(nIndex) else g_oRepDict.removeDictObj nIndex end if end if end if 'kolorowanie changeRowColor oRow, newValue c##CTRLID_ROW_CHECKBOX##_ondataentered = true end function
